2605.19394.title: EmbGen: Teaching with Reassembled Corpora
2605.19394.paper_summary: Adapting small instruction-tuned models to specialized domains often relies on supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on curated instruction-response examples, which is expensive to collect at scale. Synthetic training examples generated by a teacher LLM from a domain corpus can reduce this cost, but existing pipelines can produce homogenized outputs and do not consistently capture cross-passage or cross-document dependencies. We introduce EmbGen, a synthetic data generation pipeline that decomposes a corpus into entity-description pairs, reassembles them using semantic structure inferred from embedding similarity, and then generates question-answer (QA) pairs via proximity, intra-cluster, and inter-cluster sampling with cluster-specialized system prompts. We evaluate EmbGen against EntiGraph, InstructLab and Knowledge-Instruct on three datasets of varied semantic heterogeneity, under fixed token budgets (5 and 20 million tokens). We use lexical overlap metrics, an LLM-as-a-judge rubric, and Binary Accuracy, a composed metric combining Factual Accuracy and Completeness for evaluation. EmbGen improves Binary Accuracy on the most heterogeneous dataset by 12.5% at 5M and 88.9% at 20M tokens budget, relative to the strongest baseline, while remaining competitive across other datasets with lower heterogeneity.
2605.19394.paper_summary_zh: 調整小型指令調整模型以適應專門領域通常依賴於在精心策劃的指令-回應範例上進行的監督微調（SFT），這在大規模收集上成本高昂。由教師LLM從領域語料庫生成的合成訓練範例可以降低這一成本，但現有的流程可能會產生同質化的輸出，並且未能一致地捕捉跨段落或跨文檔的依賴關係。我們介紹了EmbGen，一個合成數據生成管道，將語料庫分解為實體-描述對，利用從嵌入相似性推斷出的語義結構重新組裝它們，然後通過近似、內聚類和跨聚類採樣生成問題-回答（QA）對，並使用專門針對聚類的系統提示。我們在三個具有不同語義異質性的數據集上，對EmbGen與EntiGraph、InstructLab和Knowledge-Instruct進行評估，並在固定的標記預算（500萬和2000萬標記）下進行。我們使用詞彙重疊指標、LLM作為評判標準的評估法則，以及二元準確率，這是一個結合事實準確性和完整性的綜合指標。相對於最強的基線，EmbGen在最異質的數據集上在500萬標記預算下提高了12.5%的二元準確率，在2000萬標記預算下提高了88.9%，同時在其他異質性較低的數據集上仍然保持競爭力。
2605.19394.author: Arun K Lenin et.al.
2605.19394.authors: Arun K Lenin, Kai Rouse, Andrea Nicastro, Anna Leontjeva
